backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Studiora backend that handles user profiles (authenticated and guest), premium tier management, feature access checks, and includes authorization and blob-storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the uploaded Studiora logo image is used in Layout.tsx and LoginPage.tsx, replacing any previously generated or SVG-based logo.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key changes, and design decisions across the Studiora React app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Studiora React app, setting the page title and mounting the root React element via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with an open AppLayout (no auth guard), redirecting `/` to `/dashboard`, and conditionally showing ProfileSetupModal only for authenticated non-guest users.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Displays a dismissible banner prompting non-premium users to upgrade, with a button that opens the PaywallScreen. Hides itself if the user is on a premium tier (via subscription context, backend profile, or testing mode).
frontend/src/components/AdvancedFocusSet: Renders a premium-gated panel with tabs for custom Pomodoro intervals, ambient sound selection, and session history. Shows a paywall prompt for non-premium users and a loading state while premium status is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedStatisti: Displays premium-gated advanced analytics including subject breakdown, completion trend area/bar charts, and a pie chart using Recharts. Non-premium users see a blurred preview with an upgrade prompt.
Full AI insights panel component that displays categorized insight cards (suggestion, encouragement, warning, feedback) with a paywall for non-premium users and expand/collapse for more than three insights.
frontend/src/components/AIInsightsSummar: Compact dashboard card showing up to two AI insights for premium users, or an upgrade prompt with a link to the progress page for free users.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Setup, Focus, Progress, Settings) using TanStack Router Links. Highlights the active tab with a styled indicator and applies a press-scale animation on interaction.
frontend/src/components/CelebrationAnima: Full-screen canvas-based confetti burst animation that auto-dismisses after ~2 seconds and calls onComplete when finished. Renders colored rectangular and circular particles with gravity and fade-out effects.
Modal dialog prompting unauthenticated users to log in via Internet Identity to enable cloud sync. Triggers the login flow on confirmation and closes on success or dismissal.
frontend/src/components/DailyMotivationC: Displays a deterministic daily motivational quote selected by day-of-year index from a hardcoded list of 30 quotes. Styled as a glass card with decorative gradient overlays and a Sparkles icon.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that renders a sticky header with the Studiora logo and ThemeToggle, a scrollable main content area, and the BottomTabBar. Constrains the app to a max-width of md.
frontend/src/components/NextFocusSession: Displays a card suggesting the next focus/Pomodoro session based on the active exam and incomplete daily tasks, with a button to navigate to the focus route.
frontend/src/components/PaywallScreen.ts: Modal dialog presenting Studiora Premium upgrade options (monthly/yearly plans and free trial), listing free-tier limitations and premium features, and delegating purchase actions to a subscription provider.
frontend/src/components/PremiumGate.tsx: Wrapper component that renders children for premium users and shows an UpgradePrompt for non-premium users, suppressing the gate while the premium status is loading.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects a new user's name on first setup and saves their profile via a mutation hook; hidden entirely in guest mode.
frontend/src/components/QuickActions.tsx: Renders three quick-action buttons (Add Task, Start Focus, Progress) that navigate to their respective routes using TanStack Router.
Shows dismissible alert banners for exams occurring within three days and for pending tasks scheduled today, derived from the provided exams array.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Button that triggers the share study plan hook and cycles through idle/sharing/shared/copied/error states, updating its icon and label accordingly.
frontend/src/components/SmartStudyInsigh: Card that displays up to three study insights (completion rate, weak subjects, revision reminders) using AI-generated insights when available and falling back to statically computed ones, with a premium paywall gate.
frontend/src/components/StudyCompanion.t: Renders an animated study companion widget with SVG plant illustrations representing different growth stages, using the `useStudyCompanion` hook to determine the current stage.
frontend/src/components/StudyTipCard.tsx: Displays a daily study tip card that cycles through a predefined list of tips based on the day of the year, with a lightbulb icon and styled glass-card layout.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorSec: Renders a grid of selectable color theme presets, gating premium themes behind a paywall check and showing lock/free/active indicators on each swatch.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A simple icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using the `useTheme` hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/components/UpgradePrompt.ts: Displays a premium upgrade prompt with a feature list, highlighting a specific feature if provided, and opens the `PaywallScreen` modal on button click.
frontend/src/contexts/SubscriptionContex: Provides a React context that exposes subscription provider, status, and premium flag via the `useSubscription` hook, with a corresponding consumer hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes due to identity updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIInsights.ts: Generates a prioritized list of AI-style study insights by applying rule-based logic over streak, daily progress, focus session history, and exam data.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmbientSound.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages AudioContext-based ambient sound generators (white noise, rain, cafe) using Web Audio API filters and buffer sources. Returns a cleanup function to stop and disconnect all audio nodes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCelebrationTrigger: Custom hook that triggers a celebration animation once per day when a progress percentage reaches 100%, persisting the shown date in localStorage to prevent repeat displays.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloudSync.ts: Hook that wraps guest mode state to determine whether data can be synced to the cloud, returning a prompt flag when the user is in guest mode.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomTheme.ts: Hook that manages a set of OKLCH color theme presets, persisting the active theme to localStorage and applying it to CSS custom properties on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useExamCountdown.ts: Custom hook that calculates days remaining until an exam date (stored in nanoseconds), returning flags for whether the exam is today or in the past.
frontend/src/hooks/useFocusSessionHistor: Hook that maintains a localStorage-backed history of up to 10 focus timer sessions, exposing functions to add new sessions and clear the history.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestMode.ts: Hook that initializes and manages guest mode state with a persistent device ID in localStorage, providing enter/exit callbacks and defaulting new users to guest mode.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestToAuthMigrati: Hook that provides a migration function to transition a guest user to an authenticated state by clearing the guest mode flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and React context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalDailyProgress: Hook that tracks daily study progress (completed vs. total tasks) in localStorage, automatically resetting counts when the date changes and computing a completion percentage.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalProfile.ts: Minimal hook that reads and writes a user display name to localStorage, exposing the current value and a setter.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStreak.ts: Hook that manages a localStorage-backed study streak counter, resetting it if more than one day has been missed and providing an increment function to record daily activity.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaywallTrigger.ts: Hook that controls paywall visibility based on whether the user has completed a task and whether they have previously dismissed the paywall, persisting both flags in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/usePremiumTestingMode: Custom hook that persists a premium testing mode toggle in localStorage, providing state and setter/toggle functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for exam CRUD and task completion mutations, with guest mode support using localStorage and a client-side study plan generator.
frontend/src/hooks/useShareStudyPlan.ts: Custom hook that builds a formatted study plan text from the active exam and exposes a share function using the Web Share API with clipboard fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudyCompanion.ts: Computes a virtual study companion's growth stage and progress based on the user's streak days and completed focus sessions, persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscription.ts: Manages subscription tier state (free, trial, monthly, yearly) with localStorage persistence and provides a provider object with methods to start trials, subscribe, and cancel.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Manages light/dark theme state, syncing with localStorage and toggling the `dark` class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind imports, CSS custom properties for an indigo-based light/dark color palette, and utility classes like glass-card with backdrop blur effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying today's study tasks, exam countdown, streak, daily progress, and widgets like motivation cards, study companion, and celebration animations.
frontend/src/pages/ExamSetup.tsx: Form page for creating a new exam study plan with subjects and topics, handling authentication guards, premium paywall for multiple exams, and submission via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/FocusMode.tsx: Pomodoro-style focus timer page with work/break phases, session history tracking, and premium-gated features like custom intervals and ambient sounds.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing/login page that offers Internet Identity authentication or guest mode entry, displaying app feature highlights and a branded hero layout.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressTracking.tsx: Progress dashboard page showing study streak, weekly stats, and a bar chart of completed vs. total sessions, with AI insights and guest/local fallback data.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to edit their display name, toggle dark/light theme, manage premium status, and access the paywall screen.
frontend/src/types/features.ts: Defines the PremiumFeature union type, a FeatureConfig interface, and a record of all premium feature metadata including display names, descriptions, and icons.
frontend/src/utils/premiumCheck.ts: Custom hook that consolidates premium status from the backend user profile, subscription context, and local testing mode into a single isPremium boolean with loading state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining custom colors (using oklch variables), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Studiora, recording the current version, existing features (custom logo integration), and configuration flags for the build planner.
